businessSummary.oneLiner: AI data analytics platform leader for government and enterprise, operating a 3-pillar system: Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue reached $4.48B (+56%). US commercial revenue surpassed $500M. The Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record, extending it across the entire US military. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - rapid deployment programs for customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 9x+ the S&P 500 average (22x) and 5x software sector average (40x). Defense AI monopoly premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 estimates. PEG ~2x even accounting for 60-65% growth, but reflects defense AI dominance

keyMetrics.name: Revenue (FY2025)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 56% YoY growth. US commercial revenue surpassed $500M, accelerating

keyMetrics.name: Price/Sales
keyMetrics.interpretation: 4x+ the software sector average (10x). Market pricing extreme premium for monopolistic position

keyMetrics.name: FCF Yield
keyMetrics.interpretation: Very high market cap relative to free cash flow. Future growth excessively priced in

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth Guidance (FY26)
keyMetrics.interpretation: $7.19B-$7.41B guidance. AIP commercial segment and Maven government contracts driving growth

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Official Pentagon Program of Record + Stock Surges 6.78%
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as an official program of record. PLTR surged 6.78% in a single day on 3/23. Long-term deployment across all US military branches confirmed

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-Month Trial Contract
growthDrivers.description: Per The Guardian, the UK Financial Conduct Authority adopted Palantir Foundry for a 3-month trial at £30K+/week for fraud and enforcement data analysis. Signal of expansion beyond defense

growthDrivers.title: Iran Conflict Real-World AI Deployment
growthDrivers.description: Per NYT, Palantir operates a system combining Pentagon intelligence with Anthropic AI technology. Combat validation is the strongest basis for additional contracts

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in accelerating growth. US commercial segment emerging as key growth engine, reducing government dependence

growthDrivers.title: Navy ShipOS $448M + Army $10B Contracts
growthDrivers.description: Consecutive large military contracts. $11.2B revenue backlog provides long-term visibility

growthDrivers.title: Wedbush Dan Ives Maintains $230 Target, 'Core of Defense AI'
growthDrivers.description: Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230 target, calling Palantir 'the backbone of US military AI.' Pentagon's official adoption validates this view

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearance, Maven official adoption, UK FCA trial expanding into financial regulation. Combat validation is a moat money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are extremely high once deployed
Top-level security clearance and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve
Rapid customer acquisition through AIP Bootcamps and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Real-time target identification in the Iran conflict. Combat data is a direct competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Hardware-focused, more complementary than competitive with Palantir's software platform

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's specialized Ontology depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly trailing Palantir in both revenue and growth

recentNews.headline: Pentagon designates Maven AI as official 'program of record.' PLTR +6.78%
recentNews.significance: Long-term Maven deployment across entire US military confirmed. Stable defense revenue base established with 6.78% single-day surge

recentNews.headline: UK Financial Conduct Authority begins Palantir Foundry 3-month trial
recentNews.significance: Expansion beyond defense into financial regulation. £30K+/week contract value

recentNews.headline: Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230 target, calls PLTR 'backbone of US military AI'
recentNews.significance: Bullish outlook maintained even before Maven official adoption news. +43% upside

recentNews.headline: Palantir AI system deployed in Iran conflict (NYT report)
recentNews.significance: Pentagon intelligence analysis with Anthropic AI technology. Combat validation strengthens case for additional contracts

recentNews.headline: PLTR down 27% from 52-week high, sparking 'collapse vs buying opportunity' debate
recentNews.significance: Market debate over Forward P/E 125x valuation premium vs execution track record

analystOpinions.notableComment: Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230 target, calling Palantir 'core US military AI infrastructure.' However, 6 sell ratings due to valuation concerns make it one of the most polarizing stocks

risks.title: Extreme Valuation (Forward P/E 125x, P/S 44x)
risks.description: Unprecedented premium even among software stocks. 30%+ drops possible if growth disappoints expectations

risks.title: Government Contract Dependency
risks.description: Significant revenue from US government contracts. Vulnerable to defense budget cuts or political changes

risks.title: CEO Insider Selling
risks.description: Alex Karp's continued stock sales could be perceived as a negative signal

risks.title: Commercial Expansion Uncertainty
risks.description: Long-term sustainability of AIP Bootcamp customer conversion rates remains unproven

buyReasons.title: Maven Official Pentagon Adoption
buyReasons.rationale: Pentagon designated Maven AI as program of record. Long-term deployment across all US military confirmed, dramatically improving defense revenue stability and scalability

buyReasons.title: FY26 Revenue +60-65% Growth Guidance
buyReasons.rationale: $7.19B-$7.41B guidance signals accelerating growth. AIP commercial segment emerging as new growth pillar

buyReasons.title: Monopolistic Defense AI Position
buyReasons.rationale: 20-year security clearance, combat validation, $11.2B backlog. A combination impossible to replicate in the short term

buyReasons.title: Government AI to Financial Regulation Expansion
buyReasons.rationale: UK FCA trial signals expansion beyond defense into broader government sectors, enlarging TAM

overallOpinion: Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record across all US military, driving a 6.78% single-day surge to $160.90. UK FCA trial contract further validates growth diversification.
FY26 revenue guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) shows accelerating growth. However, Forward P/E of 125x and P/S of 44x leave no room for execution misses.
Recovered above 50-day average ($152) with solid distance from 200-day ($125). Wedbush's $230 target (+43%) offers upside, but consensus at $150 sits below current price.

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven official adoption is the most significant milestone in Palantir's history. Yet Forward P/E of 125x prices in perfect execution. The growth story is compelling but valuation risk is real. Existing holders should maintain positions; new entrants should scale in on pullbacks.

threads.hook: Pentagon makes Maven AI official. PLTR surges 6.78%
threads.text:
$PLTR (3/24) $160.90 (+6.78%)

Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record, locking in long-term deployment across all US military branches. UK's FCA also started a Foundry trial for financial regulation.

FY26 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth. But Forward P/E of 125x and P/S of 44x carry real execution risk.

Back above the 50-day average. Wedbush targets $230 (+43%), but consensus sits at $150 below current price. This is the ultimate growth vs. valuation tug of war.

witty.hook: The entire US military uses Palantir AI now. Competitors? Start the 20-year security clearance process
witty.text:
$PLTR (3/24) Pentagon: "Maven AI, official." Competitors: "We'd also like to... right after our 20-year security clearance." +6.78%, $160.90.

1/4
thread:
UK financial regulator now uses Palantir too. Defense to finance. The only thing Palantir can't do is sell cheap. P/S 44x.

2/4

Revenue growth of 60-65% is impressive. So is the Forward P/E of 125x. Both are impressive. That's the problem.

3/4

Wedbush says $230 (+43%). Consensus says $150 (-7%). The more polarized the opinions, the more interesting this stock gets.

4/4

witty.hook: The US military officially runs on Palantir. Good luck competing with a 20-year head start
witty.text:
$PLTR (3/24) $160.90 (+6.78%)

Pentagon made Maven AI official. Want to compete? Step 1: Get top-level security clearance. Step 2: Wait 20 years. That's what a real moat looks like.

The UK's financial regulator jumped on board too. From defense to finance, Palantir expands everywhere except its price tag. Forward P/E 125x, P/S 44x.

Revenue growing 60-65% is chef's kiss. The valuation is also chef's kiss, but in a different way. Wedbush says $230 (+43%), consensus says $150 (-7%). Place your bets.

empathy.hook: PLTR holders, today was a good day
empathy.text:
$PLTR (3/24) $160.90 (+6.78%)

Down 27% from the high, the past few weeks tested everyone's conviction. But today delivered. Pentagon made Maven AI official across the entire US military.

This is arguably the most important milestone in Palantir's history. Long-term defense revenue is locked in. UK's FCA trial shows growth beyond defense. FY26 guidance of 60-65% confirms the story.

Forward P/E of 125x is the honest elephant in the room. But with Wedbush at $230 (+43%) and today's momentum, long-term holders have a reason to stay the course.
